reviews.comment:
Buena limpieza en general. Atención amable. Todos los servicios disponibles. Ubucacion estratégica. Ofrecen descuento extra por ser socio del Automóvil Club Argentino. Aceptan tarjetas de credito, débito y pago a través de la APP de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Good overall cleanliness. Friendly service. All services available. Strategic location. They offer an extra discount for members of the Automóvil Club Argentino. They accept credit cards, debit cards, and payments through the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eWIzN3lBRRAB
